headline: Bitcoin Plummets 5% as Oil Surges to $75

article.title: Bitcoin slides as Iran ceasefire collapse sees $75 oil on Hormuz blockade threats
article.summary: Bitcoin price pressure took BTC toward the "crucial" $61,000 mark as oil prices soared on the collapse of the US-Iran ceasefire.

headline: France Faces $1B Crypto Clampdown Legal Challenge

article.title: Bull Bitcoin asks French court to strike down DAC8 implementing decree
article.summary: The non-custodial Bitcoin exchange petitioned to annul a French decree implementing DAC8, arguing the rules could create surveillance and physical risks for up to 135 million European crypto holders.

headline: Oil Surges 5% as Stocks Drop 2% Overnight

article.title: Stocks Fall as US-Iran Jitters Spur Rally in Oil: Markets Wrap
article.summary: A flare-up in geopolitical risks sent stocks and bonds lower as oil jumped after President Donald Trump said a ceasefire with Iran may be over, adding the US would probably launch further strikes.

headline: Hormuz Transit Risk Surges 20% on Iran Tensions

article.title: Shipowners Assess Hormuz-Transit Risk as US-Iran Deal Crumbles
article.summary: Shipowners painted a mixed picture of their willingness to continue transiting the Strait of Hormuz in the hours after President Donald Trump said the US ceasefire with Iran is “over.”

article.summary:

headline: $85 Invested in Meme Coin Surges to $2M

article.title: Lucky Trader Turns $85 Into $2 Million on Robinhood Chain Meme Coin
article.summary: The meme coin CashCat on Robinhood Chain is the latest flavor of the hour, and one trader has turned a mini-investment into a small fortune in less than three weeks.

headline: BNB Chain Launches $100M AI Blockchain Upgrade

article.title: BNB Chain Plans New Layer-1 for AI Agents and Quantum Future
article.summary: The network’s 2026 roadmap targets faster transactions, AI-powered apps, and infrastructure aimed at competing with traditional financial systems, while preparing for a quantum future.

headline: Paradigm Raises $1.2B Fund, Expands Beyond Crypto

article.title: Paradigm raises $1.2 billion fourth fund, expanding beyond crypto into AI and robotics
article.summary: Crypto venture firm Paradigm has raised its fourth fund, a $1.2 billion vehicle that will invest in crypto, AI, robotics, and other startups.

headline: EU Expands MiCA to Cover $1T Token Market

article.title: European Commission looks to expand MiCA to cover emergence of tokenization, non-EU stablecoin issuers: report
article.summary: The European Commission is reportedly seeking comment from stakeholders on expanding MiCA rules until Sept. 30.

headline: Oil Surges 5% on Fresh Iran Tensions

article.title: Trump says ceasefire with Iran is ‘over’ and warns of further strikes
article.summary: Oil surges more than 8 per cent to exceed $80 a barrel after US president says negotiating with Tehran is a ‘waste of time’

headline: Oil Spikes 5% Amid US-Iran Escalation Fears

article.title: Why the US and Iran are stuck in a cycle of tit-for-tat strikes
article.summary: Trump’s push to get ships moving through the Strait of Hormuz keeps colliding with Tehran’s resistance to cede control
